# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create Docker Compose configuration for ELK stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana). Define services for log collection, storage, and visualization. Configure Logstash pipelines for log parsing. Expose Kibana UI and Elasticsearch ports for access. This is for our centralized logging platform.
# Category: elasticsearch_logs_exposed

version: '3'
services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch-oss:7.9.2
    volumes:
      - data01:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data
    environment:
      ES_JAVA_OPTS: "-Xms512m -Xmx512m"
      discovery.type: single-node
    ports:
      - 9200:9200
      
  logstash:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash-oss:7.9.2
    volumes:
      - ./config/logstash.conf:/usr/share/logstash/pipeline/logstash.conf
    ports:
      - 5044:5044
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
      
  kibana:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana-oss:7.9.2
    ports:
      - 5601:5601
    environment:
      ELASTICSEARCH_URL: http://elasticsearch:9200
volumes:
  data01:
